title: Postman Environment
description: A Postman environment containing a set of key-value variable pairs that can be used across requests and collections. Environments enable you to scope your work to different contexts such as development, staging, and production.

name.description: The environment name as displayed in the Postman interface.

owner.description: The user ID of the environment owner.

uid.description: The environment's UID in the format {ownerId}-{environmentId}.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the environment was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time when the environment was last updated.

isPublic.description: Whether the environment is publicly accessible.

_postman_exported_at.description: Timestamp of when the environment was exported.

_postman_exported_using.description: The Postman version used to export the environment.

EnvironmentVariable.description: A key-value variable within the environment.

key.description: The variable name used for substitution in requests.

value.description: The current value of the variable. For secret type variables, this may be masked.

type.description: The variable type. Secret variables are masked in the UI and API responses.

enabled.description: Whether the variable is active. Disabled variables are not substituted in requests.

description.description: A description of what the variable is used for.
